entries.desc: Conjure a path of shifting stone towards the target location, rooting enemies for 15 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.
Reinforce your scales, reducing damage taken by 30% . Lasts 12 sec.
Expunge toxins affecting an ally, removing all Poison effects.
Disintegrate channels 20% faster.
Wing Buffet's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.
Fly to an ally and heal them for 4,020, or heal yourself for the same amount.
Landslide's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec, and it can withstand 200% more damage before breaking.
Essence regenerates 5% faster.
Obsidian Scales has an additional charge.
Living Flame deals 3% more damage and healing.
Store 20% of your effective healing, up to 857. Your next damaging Living Flame consumes all stored healing to increase its damage dealt.
Your Living Flame and Emerald Blossom are 30% more effective on yourself.
You may reactivate Deep Breath within 3 sec after landing to travel back in time to your takeoff location.
Tail Swipe's cooldown is reduced by 2 min.
Hover increases your movement speed by 70% for the first 4 sec.
Cauterize an ally's wounds, removing all Bleed, Poison, Curse, and Disease effects. Heals for 1,330 upon removing any effect.
Casting Emerald Blossom or Verdant Embrace reduces the cast time of your next Living Flame by 40%.
Your Magic damage done is increased by 2%.
Compress time to make your next empowered spell cast instantly at its maximum empower level.
Your healing done and healing received are increased by 2%.
Disorient an enemy for 20 sec, causing them to sleep walk towards you. Damage has a chance to awaken them.
Azure Strike damages 1 additional enemy.
Magic damage taken reduced by 2%.
Your Stamina is increased by 6%.
Hover lasts 4 sec longer.
Emerald Blossom heals 2 additional allies.
Your Leech is increased by 2%.
Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.
While above 75% health, your movement speed is increased by 10%.
Obsidian Scales surrounds you with a Renewing Blaze, causing 100% of the damage it prevented to be healed back over 8 sec.
Wing Buffet and Tail Swipe knock enemies further and daze them, reducing movement speed by 70% for 4 sec.
Emerald Blossom and Verdant Embrace instantly heal you for 760 when cast.
While flying during Deep Breath, 100% of damage you would take is instead dealt over 10 sec.
Direct damage from Fire Breath consumes absorb shields from enemies, dealing 4,535 additional Spellfrost damage to them.
Let out a bone-shaking roar at enemies in a cone in front of you, increasing the duration of crowd controls that affect them by 50% in the next 10 sec.
Renewing Blaze restores you more quickly, causing damage you take to be healed back over 4 sec.
Swoop to an ally and fly with them to the target location. Clears movement impairing effects from you and your ally.
Green spells restore 5% more health.
Redirect your excess magic to a friendly healer for 1 hour. When you cast an empowered spell, you restore 0.25% of their maximum mana per empower level. Limit 1.
Glide speed and height increased by 10%.
Fire Breath causes your next Living Flame to strike 1 additional target per empower level.
Oppressing Roar removes 1 Enrage effect from each enemy, and its cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.
Hover gains 1 additional charge.
Rescue increases movement speed by 100% and allows spells to be cast while moving for 3 sec.
Source of Magic increases the target's healing and damage done by 3%.
Deep Breath stuns enemies for 3 sec.
Bend time, allowing you and your allies within 40 yds to cast their major movement ability once in the next 10 sec, even if it is on cooldown.

Evoke a paradox for you and a friendly healer, allowing casting while moving and increasing the range of most spells by 100% for 10 sec.

Affects the nearest healer within 60 yds, if you do not have a healer targeted.
Conjure an updraft to lift you and your 4 nearest allies within 20 yds into the air, reducing damage taken from area-of-effect attacks by 20% and increasing movement speed by 30% for 8 sec.
Wrap an ally with temporal energy, healing them for 912 and causing your next healing spell to cast an additional time on that ally at 70% of normal healing. Essence spells cannot be Echoed.

Inhale, gathering the power of the Dream. Release to exhale, healing yourself and 5 injured allies in a 40 yd cone in front of you for 1,634.

I:   Heals 700 instantly and 934 over 16 sec.

II:  Heals 934 instantly and 700 over 12 sec.

III: Heals 1,167 instantly and 467 over 8 sec.

Reverse an ally's injuries, healing them for 1,092 over 12 sec.

When Reversion critically heals, its duration is extended by 2 sec, up to a maximum of 12 sec.
Each cast of a Bronze spell causes your next empower spell to reach maximum level in 10% less time, stacking up to 4 times.
Living Flame has a 20% chance, and Reversion has a 15% chance to make your next Essence ability free.

Rewind 30% of damage taken in the last 5 seconds by all allies within 40 yds. Always heals for at least 760.

Healing increased by 200% when not in a raid.
Verdant Embrace temporarily bonds your life with an ally, causing your healing on either partner to heal the other for 60% of the amount. Lasts 8 sec.
Essence Burst stacks 2 times.
Stretch time around an ally for the next 8 sec, causing 50% of damage they would take to instead be dealt over 8 sec.
Your empower spells are 10% more effective. While charging a healing empower spell, you cannot be knocked back.

Emerald Blossom sends out 1 flying seedling when it bursts, plus up to 2 additional seedlings if Emerald Blossom heals fewer than 3 allies.

Seedlings each heal an ally up to 40 yds away for 988.
Your empower spells' maximum level is increased by 1.
Reversion instantly heals the target for 15% of damage taken in the last 5 sec.
15% of delayed damage from Time Dilation is absorbed.
Time Dilation gains an additional charge, and its cooldown is reduced by 10 sec.

Send forward a vortex of temporal energy, absorbing 2,280 damage on you and any allies in its path. Absorption is reduced beyond 5 targets.

Applies Echo at 30% effectiveness on the first 5 allies it passes through.
Empower spells increase your Essence regeneration rate by 100% for 8 sec.
Dream Breath's cooldown is reduced by 10 sec.
Each time you gain Essence Burst, your critical heals are 230% effective instead of the usual 200% for 10 sec.
Every other Emerald Blossom has a 100% chance for one of your Fluttering Seedlings to grow into a new Emerald Blossom.
Increases your maximum Essence to 6.
Echo replicates 50% more healing.
Empower spells cause time to flow 10% faster for you, increasing movement speed, cooldown recharge rate, and cast speed. Lasts 10 sec.
Send out a ripple of temporal energy, absorbing 3,420 damage and applying Echo at 30% effectiveness on your target and up to 4 allies within 40 yds.
Temporal Anomaly reduces the cooldowns of your empower spells by 5 sec.
Dream Breath healing increased by 20%, and Living Flame healing increased by 30%.

Take in a deep breath and fly to the targeted location, healing all allies in your path for 1,900 immediately, and 4,306 over 15 sec, reduced beyond 5 targets.

Removes all root effects. You are immune to movement impairing and loss of control effects.

Damage taken while you are flying is absorbed, up to 100% of your maximum health.
Causes your next 3 helpful spells to be duplicated and stored in a time lock. You may reactivate Stasis any time within 30 sec to quickly unleash their magic.
Your healing is increased by 10% on targets with your Reversion.
Consuming a full Temporal Compression grants you Essence Burst.
Casting Echo grants one stack of Ouroboros, increasing the healing of your next Emerald Blossom by 30%, stacking up to 5 times.
Fire Breath and Deep Breath heal 5 nearby injured allies for 80% of damage done to up to 5 targets, split evenly among them.
Casting Dream Flight or Stasis increases your healing over time by 60% and causes Living Flame and Reversion to have a 100% increased chance to grant Essence Burst. Lasts 15 sec.
Rewind's cooldown is reduced by 60 sec.
Disintegrate deals 35% more damage and generates 1,080 mana over its duration.

When you or an ally fall below 30% health, a version of yourself enters your timeline and heals them for 12,061. Your alternate self continues healing for 8 sec before returning to their timeline.

May only occur once every 60 sec.
Dream Breath healing is increased by 15%.
Red spells deal 20% additional damage and healing.
Reversion, Time Dilation, Echo, and Temporal Anomaly last 15% longer and cost 15% less mana.
Verdant Embrace healing is increased by 30%. In addition, it no longer causes you to leap to your target, instead sending forth a Dream Simulacrum.
Verdant Embrace gains an additional charge.
Essence Burst increases the effectiveness of your next Essence ability by 35%.
Reversion healing has a chance to cause your next Living Flame to cast instantly and deal 50% increased healing or damage. Stacks up to 2 charges.
Casting Emerald Blossom causes your next Echo to cast on an additional ally within 25 yards at 100% effectiveness. Stacks up to 2 charges.
Bronze healing and absorption increased by 15%.

Essence abilities have a chance to infuse your next Reversion with the power of the Green Dragonflight, upgrading it to Merithra's Blessing:

 Merithra's Blessing
Spring a bloom of life from your target, healing them and up to 4 other allies within 30 yards for 950. Blooms may heal your primary target multiple times if no nearby injured allies are present.
Living Flame and Azure Strike have 1 extra chance to trigger Essence Burst when they critically strike.

Disintegrate damage consumes 1.0 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for 150% of the amount consumed.

Pyre damage consumes 4 sec of Fire Breath from enemies it damages, detonating it for 115% of the amount consumed.
Fire Breath deals its damage 20% more often.
Obsidian Scales also applies to your target or 1 nearby injured ally at 50% value.
Your wounds have a small chance to cauterize, healing you for 30% of damage taken. Occurs more often from attacks that deal high damage.
Hover and Deep Breath travel 40% faster, and Hover travels 40% further.
Tail Swipe and Wing Buffet scorch enemies and blind them with ash, causing their next attack within 4 sec to miss.
Fire Breath's damage over time lasts 4 sec longer.
Fire Breath reaches its maximum empower level 20% faster.
Critical strike chance against targets above 50% health increased by 15%.
Fire Breath gains an additional charge.
Essence abilities are enhanced with Flame, dealing 20% of healing or damage done as Fire over 8 sec.
Fire Breath's damage over time is increased by 30%. Dream Breath's heal over time is increased by 30%.
Fire Breath's cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.
Twin Flame bounces to up to 2 additional targets.
Fire Breath has a 50% chance to generate Essence Burst.
Consuming Essence Burst fires a twin flame, striking your target for 684 Fire damage.
Upheaval deals 50% additional damage over 8 sec.
Empower spells send up to 3 Chrono Flames to your targets.
Each time you cast an empower spell, unstable time magic reduces its cooldown by up to 6 sec.
Ebon Might and Prescience gain a chance equal to your critical strike chance to grant 50% additional stats.

Non-defensive abilities with a 45 second or longer cooldown grant 5% Intellect for 15 sec.

Essence spells extend the duration by 1 sec.
Warp reduces damage taken by 20%, starting high and reducing over 3 sec.
Warp leaves a trail of Motes of Acceleration. Allies who come in contact with a mote gain 20% increased movement speed for 30 sec.
Prescience lasts 15% longer.
Prescience cooldown reduced by 2 sec and it grants 1% additional critical strike chance.

Hover now causes you to briefly warp out of existence and appear at your destination. Hover's cooldown is also reduced by 5 sec.

Hover continues to allow Evoker spells to be cast while moving.
For each damage over time effect from Upheaval, gain 3% haste, up to 9%.
Living Flame is enhanced with Bronze magic, repeating 25% of the damage or healing you dealt to the target in the last 5 sec as Arcane, up to 950.
Tip the Scales overloads you with temporal energy, increasing your haste, movement speed, and cooldown recovery rate by 30%, decreasing over 30 sec.
Chrono Flames' maximum damage or healing is increased by 40%, up to 1,330 Arcane.
Living Flame's cast time is reduced by 0.2 sec, and it deals 50% increased damage or healing when it is a non-instant cast.
Tip the Scales' cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.
